course_description.overview: Three distances (Piccolo 45-50km, Medio 85-90km, Gran 135-140km) traversing the Perth Hills through Kalamunda, Gooseberry Hill, Boya, Darlington, Mundaring, Carmel, and Pickering Brook, featuring hill climbs like Zig Zag and Heritage Drive.

key_segments.name: Zig Zag Climb
key_segments.description: Iconic and breathtaking climb in the upper Perth Hills on Piccolo route.

key_segments.name: Heritage Drive
key_segments.description: Signature hill climbing segment on Gran Fondo.

key_segments.name: Pickering Brook Apex
key_segments.description: Climb back through Pickering Brook to finish.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Progressive difficulty with significant hill climbing in the Darling Range; open road event with technical descents and climbs suitable for experienced road cyclists.

logistics.getting_there: Start/Finish at Gooseberry Hill Hall Community, 42 Ledger Rd, Gooseberry Hill (near Kalamunda); staggered starts from 7am.
logistics.accommodation: Perth Hills area; options in Kalamunda, Gooseberry Hill, or nearby Perth.
logistics.registration_details: Online via Race Roster; early bird $110-$140 (ends Dec 31, 2025), standard $130-$150 (Jan-Mar 1, 2026), late $150-$170, last chance $190; no refunds, transfers, or day-of registration; ages 12+ (12-17 with adult).
logistics.bike_logistics: Road bike recommended; carry mobile phone; event support includes traffic management, signage, and aid stations.
logistics.local_considerations: Open roads (WA road rules apply); summer weather - hydrate at stops; charity partner Street Friends WA.

final_verdict.one_liner: Premier gran fondo filling WA's hilly road cycling gap with scenic climbs east of Perth.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Road cyclists seeking challenging hills, from intermediate (Piccolo/Medio) to advanced (Gran); first-timers to WA gran fondos.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for affordable access to iconic Perth Hills terrain and community event vibe.
pro_tips: Register early for best value; train for repeated climbs like Zig Zag.
Carry phone and hydrate - open roads in potential summer heat.
Combine with Perth stay for easy access.
Support charity partner Street Friends WA.
